feed.title: SAP Community - BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing
feed.subtitle: BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to update sequence number /SCWM/STOP_SEQ in header of outbound delivery in EWM
entry.content: I have created TU from /n/scwm/tu and at the time of assignment of outbound delivery , I would like to update sequence number. Please let me know which BADI I can use and in which table I can see entry.

entry.title: Calculation Procedure
entry.content: what is calculation procedure in vistex and how it is useful for rebate calculations

entry.title: How to pass 0calyear based on ycalmonth on cube using customer exit variable?
entry.content:
Helli Everyone,

I have a requirement that to pass 0calyear based on ycalmonth on cube using customer exit variable. In cube we have data as below.

Version 700 data in cube

OpCoVersionYCALMONTH0CALYEAR0CALMONTH2Quantity
poland70012.2023202312150
poland70012.202320241160
poland70012.202320242170

Version 100 data in cube

OpCoVersion0CALMONTH0CALYEAR0CALMONTH2Quantity
poland10012.2023202312180
poland1001.202420241190

In the bex query created a YCALMONTH based variable of manual input. If user enters 12.2023 as YCALMONTH, it means we are having 0CALYEAR's are 2023 and 2024 for YCALMONTH.

In for V100 if we have 2023 and 2024 as 0CALYEAR.

Question: In LY column how to pass 0calyear's based on ycalmonth's - 0calyear's on cube using customer exit variable?

 

Report
columns - 0CALYEAR2023 20242024
columns - version700100700100
rows - CYLYCYLY
 150180160190
   170 

So, how to write a customer exit variable to fetch 0calyear's of specific ycalmonth on cube and those 0calyear's: 2023, 2024 in V100 to pass to a variable.
BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing

BW Business Explorer (SAP BEx)

entry.title: How is BIREQU_***** job getting triggered
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement where in we need to stop sending data to SAP BW from SAP ECC system. I think the data is going because of this job that starts with BIREQU_ . But I dont know how the job is getting created. Everyday the variant is different and name last part is different. 

Could you please help me in knowing how to stop this job from getting created. How to stop data flow to SAP BW.

entry.title: Paste multiple values to the table by VBA
entry.content:
Hello!

I need to paste the multiple values from Excel to the table control using VBA.

The data is being pasted only by the last visible row, I cannot paste them all, cannot even do it manually (I think it should be possible as clipboard, but cannot find it in this table).

I have found here solutions like Clipboard method but I am not able to use them, because it is not VBA and I do not know this programming language.

Can someone please help me with that problem?

entry.title: Upgrade : From SAP BW/4HANA 2.0 Sp10 to SAP BW/4HANA 2023 Version
entry.content:
Hello All,

Our client is planning to upgrade the BW application from : BW/4HANA 2.0 SP10 to BW/4HANA 2023.

We would like to collect the key information's like below as part of our analysis , Could you please help me with the information which will help us for the same.

- Whether we need to migrate it to version 2021 first or directly migrated to version 2023

- What are all the existing functionalities or objects getting impacted with newer releases?

- Any manual/automated adjustments required post upgrade?

- From BW Development perspective - Do we need adjust modelling objects post upgrade ?

 

Thanks,

Kiran

entry.title: Adding /POSDW/TLOGF_EXT table attribute to 0RT_PA_TRAN_CONTROL DS
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Requirement :

I have a scenario of adding one of the attribute which is present in extension table /POSDW/TLOGF_EXT to 0RT_PA_TRAN_CONTROL DS. Did anyone has experience on how to achieve this req. 

 

Regards,

Praveen.

entry.title: S_DEVELOP and S_RFC Auth Objects
entry.content:
Dear BW Experts,

We are currently migrating the Old BW flows using In-place migration. For performing this, We got one SAP note 2383530 from SAP which has all authorization objects and other details. In the SAP Note, the Authorization Object S_DEVELOP and S_RFC is specified. I just want to know, what are the tasks that will support, while adding the authorization objects S_DEVELOP and S_RFC to the User. I have an idea that, S_DEVELOP auth object is specific to ABAP. But want to know specific tasks related to ABAP.

I also want to know about the Auth object S_RFC. Could you please let me know what are tasks that will allow specific to Auth Object S_RFC.

Link for SAP Note :

2383530

Thanks.

entry.title: How to use CDS View in Calculation View?
entry.content:
Hi, 

I want to create a new Calculation View with a CDS View named CSTOCKQUANVALCUR, but I cannot create a Virtual Table because I think CSTOCKQUANVALCUR needs parameters.

That's why I looked at the view that is the source of CSTOCKQUANVALCUR and saw that the CDS View named 'PMATSTKQTYVALCU1' has no parameters. Also, when I checked, I saw that I could create a Virtual Table with this CDS View.

After creating the Virtual Table, I selected this CDS View in SQL Console, but I saw that no data came. I selected this View directly in the Source System instead of Virtual Table, but no data came again.

However, when I do Data Preview in ABAP or look at SE11/SE16N, I see data coming.

My question is this: How can I use this CDS View in Calculation View? If there is an authorization problem, how can I pass it?

entry.title: How to execute a native sql query from abap program over a HANA calculation view?
entry.content: How can I execute a select from abap over a hana calculation view? supposing that my calculation view is in the schema "_SYS.BIC" and its name is "test/my_view", so how can I select its data from abap?

entry.title: Dynamic data partitioning in BW4/HANA
entry.content:
HI,

We are trying to implement Dynamic data partitioning on ACDOCA ADSO which is built on a streaming process.

The current volume data in ADSO is around 2 B records. The automated partitioning on data base level which is hash partition is implemented.

When we tried dynamic partitioning on the active table through BW application perspective in properties. The field 'Fiscal Year' is selected as field for partition. Granularity Field is greyed out.

indexserver.ini -> [partitioning] ->"allow_dynamic_range_partitioning" with value "true” is set.

After this the ADSO is checked and activated which further prompts for remodeling, after the successful remodeling of an ADSO, it is observed that there is no impact on ADSO Active table, which means the partition is not implemented.

 

Question is there any prerequisite or any missed step which is missed here because of which the active table is not partitioned?

Also is this activity a transport required activity or can be done directly in production?

entry.title: Define CDS column as dimension and measure for SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
Hello,

I've created a CDS view that I would like to use as a source (modeler) in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC).

When I use this source in a SAC Story (bar chart), I encounter a problem where the values are mixed up between dimensions and measures.

Is there a way to define the columns as dimensions and measures in CDS?

Regards

Hassin

entry.title: max. excel export in BW4web
entry.content:
Hello,

we're on BW4HANA SP2.

How can I increase the max. number of excel rows in the export function of the transaction BW4WEB ?

I found no possibilities in the settings.

 

Thanks

entry.title: BW Transformation end routine populated field list
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

despite what I can see in structure, in end routine the result_package type _ty_s_TG_1 contains all fields, including the ones not mapped with any rule.

Investigating in generated program code I found the method get_fields_populated0001, but neither this method nor the output table are visible in end routine.

How can I get this field list?

Thanks in advance

Dario

entry.title: Unable to write select query in BW transformations
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I want to display current date in one of the field routine of the BW transformations. I wrote the below code in field routine and getting the error message as
Incorrect syntax error near :CUR_DATE.

outtab = select (select current_date into CUR_DATE from dummy AS "CUR_DATE"),
"RECORD",
"SQL__PROCEDURE__SOURCE__RECORD"
from :INTAB;

Please guide me how to solve this error.

Thanks.

entry.title: How to call Class inside Transformation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to call my class in one of my BW transformations.

To make it simple, I just created a Class (SYSTEM_DATE_CLASS) which will give the output as System date.

In my BW transformation, I just created a new Info-object "CUR_DATE" in my ADSO. While loading the date to ADSO, I need to write a field routine by calling the system date Class and populate the date for the field CUR_DATE in the ADSO. I dont know, how to call class inside transformation with variable. I am getting error in Class implementation in Outtab.

Invalid character string "(" in "ZDELETE=>AMDP_SYSTEM_DATE(". Only transparent database tables, views, or database procedures can be specified after USING.

 

CLASS SYSTEM_DATE_CLASS DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .
  PUBLIC SECTION.
*AMDP Class 
  INTERFACES if_amdp_marker_hdb.
*declare Class method amdp_system_date
  class-methods amdp_system_date
  exporting
  value(i_sydate) type D.
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS SYSTEM_DATE_CLASS IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD amdp_system_date by database procedure
                   for hdb
                   language sqlscript
                   options read-only.

i_sydate = session_context( 'SAP_SYSTEM_DATE' );
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

BW transformation Code :

 

class ZCLKMCRK3HNI3A57NCPAQHC_M definition
  public
  create public .

public section.
 interfaces IF_AMDP_MARKER_HDB .
   types:

methods S0001_G01_R18
    importing
      value(i_req_dtp_name) type STRING
      value(i_req_logsys) type STRING
      value(i_req_src_name) type STRING
      value(i_req_src_type) type STRING
      value(i_req_tgt_name) type STRING
      value(i_req_tgt_type) type STRING
      value(i_req_requid) type STRING
      value(i_sydate) type D
      value(inTab) type TN_T_IN_S0001_G01_R18
    exporting
      value(outTab) type TN_T_OUT_S0001_G01_R18 .
protected section.
private section.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS ZCLKMCRK3HNI3A57NCPAQHC_M IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD S0001_G01_R18 BY DATABASE PROCEDURE FOR HDB LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT OPTIONS READ-ONLY USING zdelete=>amdp_system_date( i_sydate ).

outtab = select ( CALL "ZDELETE=>AMDP_SYSTEM_DATE( I_SYDATE )" ) AS "CUR_DATE",
                 "RECORD",
                 "SQL__PROCEDURE__SOURCE__RECORD"
                 from :INTAB;

errortab = SELECT NULL AS "ERROR_TEXT",
                  NULL AS "SQL__PROCEDURE__SOURCE__RECORD"
                  FROM "DUMMY";

ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: SAP HANA: Correct source System for Packages in HANA DEV and PROD
entry.content:
Hi experts,
I'm quite new in HANA DB and I need your help regarding the source system of packages on HANA DB in our PROD and DEV system.
We have two BW 7.5 on HANA systems.
BW PROD -> PB1
BW DEV-> TB2
I would like to correct the "SRC_SYSTEM" in "_SYS_REPO"."PACKAGE_CATALOG" on our PROD and DEV BW HANA.
In screenshot "HANA DEV (TB2) content" you can see the packages in HANA Studio in DEV system.
In screenshot "HANA PROD (PB1) content" you can see the packages in HANA Studio in DEV system.
I also made an Excel File as comparison between the two systems where the source system is NOT "SAP".
Here my SQL Statement for reference:

SELECT * FROM "_SYS_REPO"."PACKAGE_CATALOG" where SRC_SYSTEM!='SAP'

Please let me know if I have forgotten any important information for you.
I'm new to this area.

Best regards,
Martin

entry.title: SAP HANA
How to display landed cost of multiped PO
entry.content: How I can get the landed cost list against PO list. If I am not authorized for the SAP Tables. I want to know the standard T. Code for that if SAP provided.

entry.title: S4 Brownfield (Native HANA)
entry.content:
Hi,

Requesting your inputs here. Below is my question pls. 

#1

In S/4 Brownfield Migration, will the tables be put in different schema? the source system has Enterprise HANA (Native HANA), do we need to replace all the tables within HANA Calculation views as ECC.MARA --> S4.MARA

# 2  

Or, in S/4 brownfields migration, the changes happen in the same schema? Is there any need to replace tables within HANA calculation views or SAP S/4HANA, will adjust these Calculation Views to account for the new table structures and data models. Appreciate your reply on this. Thanks
